title: Create rpm and baseline test script
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

A test to be run "by hand" on a newly installed VM.  This will install git and the latest buildah. It will then clone buildah and build it's rpm.  The rpm will be installed in a second container and tested/verified.  

The Buildah baseline test will then be run on the VM and then the newly created Buildah rpm's will be installed on the VM and the baseline test will be run a second time.

This is the first pass and I'm sure this will be modified as we move forward.  Error handling at the moment is weakish for instance.  This script is not run by any of the automated tests, it is only for use for sanity testing.

This script borrowed heavily from @nalind's rpm.bats tests.
